# hetzner_ip_mac (Resource)

Manages a separate MAC address for a Hetzner IP address.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address to generate a separate MAC for.

### Read-Only

- `mac` (String) The generated MAC address.
